text.title: Structural Design Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is there a concrete structural symptom (interface mismatch, class explosion, behaviour stacking, broad entry point, access control, memory pressure)?

text.example: Signal: HTTP client + retry + cache + auth currently stacked as 4 decorators. r3 violated (depth=4). Shortlist: middleware pipeline (chain of responsibility / decorator family) vs current decorators. Score: middleware fit=5, cost=2. Decision: refactor to middleware pipeline; cap decorators at 2 via lint. ADR-STRUCT-009 Accepted, review trigger = decorator count > 2 on any function in CI.
